LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_15.english: If we had stayed at the base, we would have had enough to last a few months, but considering the continuous marches and the battles with Soul Junk that occur every time, it is not a comfortable situation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_15.korean: 주둔지에 있었다면 몇 달은 버틸 양이지만, 계속되는 행군과 그때마다 일어나는 소울정크와의 전투를 생각하면 여유로운 상황은 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_16.english: Iris is already under mental pressure.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_17.english: It is overwhelming enough just leading colleagues in a situation like that, but if it leads to a shortage of supplies, it wouldn't be surprising if something happened.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_17.korean: - 그런 상황에서 동료를 이끌고 있다는 것만으로도 벅찬데, 물자 부족으로까지 이어지면 무슨 일이 일어나도 이상하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_18.english: - You must take action before that happens.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_18.korean: - 그렇게 되기 전에 반드시 손을 써야 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_2.english: Without revealing where they were heading, what they planned to do in the future, or anything else…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_2.korean: - 어디로 향하는지도, 앞으로 어떻게 할지도 그 무엇도 알리지 않은 채…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_20.english: ...It's the first time I've hit someone like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_21.english: Neither I, nor Shirayuri before the apocalypse, needed to resort to violence to motivate people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_21.korean: 지금의 저도, 멸망 전의 시라유리도 사람을 움직이게 하기 위해 폭력을 휘두를 필요는 없었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_22.english: A few words of secret that person held... that was enough.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_22.korean: 그 사람이 가지고 있는 비밀 몇 마디… 그걸로 충분했으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_23.english: But I... violence in that way...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_24.english: I might be more violent than I thought.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_25.english: Back then, I just… thought Miss Iris was pitiful.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_25.korean: 그때는 그저… 이리스 양이 안타깝다고 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_26.english: A good friend… Me? But I… Miss Iris…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_26.korean: 좋은 친구… 제가 말인가요?&n하지만 저는 이리스 양을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_28.english: Yes, I will think about Miss Iris again as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_28.korean: 네, 저도 이리스 양에 대해서 다시 한번 생각해볼게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_29.english: Then, I guess I need to decide how to proceed from now on.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_29.korean: 그럼, 지금은 앞으로 어떻게 행동할지 정해야겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_3.english: Tenebris did not hold onto Iris like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_30.english: Whatever happens, to resolve this matter, I must meet with Iris again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_30.korean: - 뭐가 됐든, 이번 일을 해결하기 위해서는 이리스와 다시 만나야 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_31.english: But I won't leave a good impression on Iris either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_31.korean: - 하지만 나 역시 이리스에게는 좋은 인상으로 남아 있지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_32.english: Considering his tendency to dislike adults, there is a high chance he won't meet me even if I go in person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_32.korean: - 어른을 싫어하는 성향을 생각하면 내가 직접 가도 만나주지 않을 가능성이 높아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_33.english: Even if they agree to meet me, there is no guarantee they will properly listen to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_33.korean: - 설사 만나 준다고 해도 내 말을 제대로 들어준다는 보장도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_34.english: Do we have no choice but to use somewhat coercive measures here? No, that won't provide a fundamental solution.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_34.korean: - 어쩔 수 없이 여기서는 조금 강압적인 수단을 써야 하나?&n아니, 그래서는 근본적인 해결이 되지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_37.english: Yes, it is a way to meet Miss Iris and open up to each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_37.korean: 네, 이리스 양과 만날 수도 있고 서로 마음을 털고 이야기도 할 수 있는 방법이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_38.english: Shirayuri smiled, took a notebook out of her pocket, and opened it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_38.korean: - 시라유리는 웃으며 주머니 속에서 수첩을 꺼내 펼쳤다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_39.english: To summarize, Miss Iris dislikes people who give her orders. And since most of those giving orders are adults, she ultimately refuses to sit down and talk with them.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_39.korean: 정리하면 이리스 양은 자신에게 명령하는 사람을 싫어하죠.&n그리고 그 명령하는 대부분이 어른이니, 결국 어른과 마주 앉아 대화하는 걸 거부하는 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_4.english: He didn't say it, but he probably didn't even have the energy left to persuade Iris, who was already filled with hatred toward him.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_4.korean: - 말하진 않았지만, 이미 자신에 대한 증오로 가득 찬 이리스를 설득할 기력조차 남지 않은 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_40.english: Then it's simple. If you aren't an adult... wouldn't everything be resolved? Besides, this happens to be virtual reality, doesn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_40.korean: 그렇다면 단순하죠.&n어른이 아니라면… 모든 게 해결되지 않을까요?&n게다가 마침 여기는 가상현실이잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_41.english: - Wait... You said it's okay as long as I'm not an 'adult'...? Is this virtual reality...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_42.english: Hehehe, since things have come to this, I have no choice but to do it, do I?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_42.korean: 우후후, 이렇게 된 이상 할 수밖에 없지 않나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_43.english: It's here. Miss Iris is in the wide area if you follow this path all the way.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_43.korean: 여기에요.&n이 길을 쭉 따라가면 있는 넓은 장소에 이리스 양이 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_44.english: There are sentries, but... looking like this, Commander, you should be able to pass through without any difficulty.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_44.korean: 보초가 있긴 하지만… 지금 모습의 사령관님이라면 어렵지 않게 통과하실 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_45.english: Then, as I mentioned beforehand, I will prepare it in advance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_45.korean: 그럼 저는 사전에 말씀드린 대로 미리 준비해 놓겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_46.english: Commander, you aren't sulking, are you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_47.english: Commander, you know that this is the surest method for now, don't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_47.korean: 지금으로선 이게 제일 확실한 방법이라는 걸 사령관님도 아시잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_48.english: Hehe, yes, have a safe trip.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_5.english: - Maybe he gave up because he was fed up with her for not believing in him until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_5.korean: - 어쩌면 끝까지 자신을 믿어주지 않은 그녀에게 질려 포기한 걸지도 모른다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_50.english: Please take good care of Miss Iris.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_51.english: If many people saw this now, they would be happy... It's a shame.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_51.korean: 지금 이 모습을 본다면, 즐거워할 분들이 많을 텐데… 아쉽네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_52.english: Yes, of course I won't write it 'in this notebook'. Hehe...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_52.korean: 네, 물론 '이 수첩에는' 적지 않을 거예요. 후후…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_54.english: Damn it!! Ugh, it still hurts!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_55.english: That guy, hitting with all his might...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_55.korean: 그 녀석, 온 힘을 다해 때리고 말이야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_58.english: Why? Did Soul Junk show up again?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_59.english: No, actually, someone came to visit...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_6.english: If only we had understood each other even a little bit… the outcome would surely have been different…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_6.korean: - 조금이라도 서로 이해했다면… 분명 결과는 달랐을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_60.english: You came to find me? To such a remote place? Who is it? You didn't send them from the Grass Blanket side, did you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_60.korean: 찾아왔다고? 이런 외진 곳에?&n누군데? 설마 잔디이불 쪽에서 보낸 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_61.english: That's not it. It's... a 'young child'.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_62.english: So it's you? The little kid who suddenly showed up.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_63.english: Where did you come from? It wouldn't be easy to come all the way here alone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_63.korean: 어디서 온 거야? 여기까지 혼자 오는 게 쉬운 일은 아닐 텐데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_64.english: You got lost? Don't think you drifted in during the recent hiatus, do you? Huh...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_64.korean: 길을 잃었다고? 설마 최근 공백에 흘러들어온 건가?&n응…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_65.english: Wait a minute, that face… It looks like I’ve seen it somewhere before.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_65.korean: 가만있어 봐, 그 얼굴…. 어디서 많이 본 것 같은데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_67.english: Hmm... I'm pretty sure I've seen this recently... and the memory is hazy...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_67.korean: 으응… 분명 최근에 본 적이 있는 것 같은데...&n기억이 날 듯 말 듯…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_68.english: I'm going to get caught at this rate! I guess there's no other choice... I have no choice but to use that method...!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_68.korean: - 이러다 들키겠어! 어쩔 수 없나… 그 방법을 사용하는 수밖에…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_70.english: What, what's wrong all of a sudden? Why are you crying?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_70.korean: 뭐, 뭐야 갑자기? 왜 울고 그래?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_71.english: Ugh, okay! I said I get it! Sorry for glaring at you! I was wrong! So don't cry! Stop!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_71.korean: 윽, 알았어! 알았다고! 노려봐서 미안해! 내가 잘못했어! 그러니까 울지 마! 뚝!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_72.english: Really, really! See, good boy, right? You're a man, aren't you? You shouldn't cry over something like this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_72.korean: 정말 정말! 자, 착하지?&n사나이잖아? 이 정도로 울면 안 되지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_73.english: Haa... this is going to be a headache...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_74.english: Ms. Iris, what are you going to do?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_75.english: What else can we do... We can't just leave a child like this. We'll have to keep him for the time being.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_75.korean: 어쩌긴… 어린아이를 이대로 내버려둘 수도 없잖아.&n당분간 우리가 데리고 있어야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_77.english: I know that too. That supplies are going to start running low soon. I'll be moving to find them soon.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_77.korean: 나도 알고 있어. 슬슬 물자가 부족해질 거라는걸.&n조만간 물자를 찾으러 움직일 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_8.english: I found where Miss Iris is.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_81.english: Ah, no, it's fine... It's a bit bad for my heart...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_81.korean: 아아, 아니야, 괜찮아…&n심장에 좀 안 좋네…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_87.english: Why have you been following me around like that since earlier? You're being annoying...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_87.korean: 아까부터 왜 그렇게 졸졸 따라다니는 거야? 귀찮게…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_88.english: Ugh... well... it's not like it's impossible...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_88.korean: 으윽… 뭐어… 안 되는 건 아닌데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_89.english: If you make that face… I can't refuse.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_89.korean: 그런 표정을 지으면… 거절할 수가 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_9.english: It isn't far yet, but considering the speed of travel so far, it will get further and further away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_9.korean: 아직은 멀지 않은 곳이지만, 지금까지의 이동 속도를 생각하면 점점 더 멀어질 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_90.english: What on earth is this? Do I look lonely to you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_90.korean: 이건 또 무슨 소리야?&n넌 내가 외롭게 보여?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_92.english: You're just a little kid, yet you're asking all sorts of things?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_93.english: … It’s been like that since I was little.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_94.english: If you only listen to others, you won't be able to do anything in the end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_94.korean: 다른 사람 말만 듣고 있으면, 결국 아무것도 못 해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_96.english: Remember this well, too. In the end, the only one you can trust is yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_96.korean: 너도 잘 기억해둬.&n결국 마지막에 믿을 건 자기 자신뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_97.english: It's just how it is. It means that if adults unnecessarily give you unsolicited advice, things only get more complicated.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_97.korean: 그냥 그런 게 있어.&n괜히 어른들이 훈수 두면 더 꼬이기만 한다는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_98.english: … I hate it. Especially those who act all high and mighty while knowing nothing about my life. 'You shouldn't do that.' 'Do it like everyone else.' … It was always just words like that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_98.korean: …싫지. 특히 내 인생에 대해선 아무것도 모르면서 잘난 척하는 것들.&n'그렇게 하면 안 된다.' '다른 사람처럼 해라.' …언제나 그런 말뿐이었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_99.english: … You’re a really strange kid. Are you really a child? Isn’t it just someone wearing a mask and disguising themselves as a little child?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_99.korean: …너, 참 묘한 애네.&n진짜 애 맞아? 누군가 탈을 쓰고 어린 아이로 변장한 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_65.english: get angry sometimes, too. I've even gotten angry at X-00 Tiamat.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_65.korean: 저도 화날 때가 있는 걸요.&n티아멧한테도 화낸 적 있고요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_22.english: [c][00FF00][X-00 Tiamat, Mina! The target has gone that way!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_49.english: We were able to destroy it because Mina helped, but Mina was originally supposed to protect Ur and Prankster Mercury.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_49.korean: 미나가 도와줬기 때문에 부술 수 있었지만, 미나는 원래 우르와 머큐리를 지켜줬어야 했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_53.english: Is it a new member who can act alongside X-00 Tiamat and respond to various situations…
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_53.korean: - 티아멧과 함께 행동하고 다양한 상황에 대응할 수 있는 새로운 인원인가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_61.english: X-00 Tiamat, can you bring the other strikers?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_61.korean: 티아멧, 다른 스트라이커 애들을 데리고 와줄래?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_21.english: I explained to X-00 Tiamat what had happened in the virtual reality game so far.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_21.korean: - 나는 지금까지 가상현실 게임에서 있었던 일들을 티아멧에게 설명했다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_11.english: [c][00FF00][This is… X-00 Tiamat. Commander, are you listening?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_2.english: [c][00FF00][X-00 Tiamat, once you get out of that forest, there will be a swarm of Iron Bugs. There are quite a lot of them, so please be careful!][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_2.korean: [c][00FF00][티아멧, 그 숲을 빠져나가면 철충들이 몰려 있을 거예요.&n수가 상당히 많으니 주의하세요!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_21.english: … Is Prankster Mercury perhaps afraid of ghosts?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_38.english: X-00 Tiamat kissed me, perhaps realizing that I was trying to hide the fact that it was virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_38.korean: - 티아멧은 내가 가상현실이라는 걸 숨기려고 한다는 걸 눈치챘는지 입을 맞춰 주었다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_61.english: … X-00 Tiamat, if you can talk to that person, please bring them over here.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_61.korean: …티아멧, 그 인물과 대화가 가능하다면 이쪽으로 데려와줘.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_71.english: Would it be okay if I asked X-00 Tiamat?

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_18.english: Prankster Mercury and I were relatively okay, but I heard that X-00 Tiamat and Ur had a lot of terrible things happen to them because they were created for experimental purposes from the start.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_18.korean: 저랑 머큐리는 그나마 괜찮은 편이었지만, 티아멧과 우르는 처음부터 실험을 목적으로 만들어졌기 때문에 끔찍한 일도 많았다고 들었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_52.english: Did something happen? X-02 Ullr is clinging so tightly.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_52.korean: 무슨 일이라도 있었나요?&n우르가 그렇게 꼬옥 붙어 있고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_54.english: Following X-00 Tiamat, this time Efnell has started to look like a mom.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8ED_54.korean: 티아멧에 이어서 이번에는 에프넬이 엄마처럼 보이기 시작했사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_27.english: Prankster Mercury and I were relatively okay, but I heard that X-00 Tiamat and Ur were created for experimental purposes from the start, so there were many terrible experiments.
LastCorruptedRecord3-8OP_27.korean: 저랑 머큐리는 그나마 괜찮은 편이었지만, 티아멧과 우르는 처음부터 실험을 목적으로 만들어졌기 때문에 끔찍한 실험도 많았다고 들었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_35.english: X-00 Tiamat, please wait a moment. The Commander has just called.
LastCorruptedRecord3-9OP_35.korean: 티아멧, 잠깐 기다려주세요.&n지금 사령관에게 호출이 들어왔사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_12.english: Still, it's a relief that Mr. Vargr is wearing normal clothes.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_12.korean: 그래도 바르그 씨는 정상적인 복장이라 다행이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_13.english: If even Mr. Vargr had been dressed like that, I think it would have been difficult to strike up a conversation.
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_13.korean: 뭔가 바르그 씨까지 저런 복장이었다면 말을 걸기 어려웠을 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_31.english: Wow wow wow... Mr. Vargr's outfit...

LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_8.english: Ah, Mr. Vargr... well... I have gotten somewhat used to it since coming to Orca, but...
LastCorruptedRecord4-1SUBED_8.korean: 아, 바르그 씨...&n그게... 오르카에 와서 이제 어느 정도 익숙해지긴 했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_11.english: Oh, I'm finally here! Hello! I'm T-2 Brownie from the Steel Line unit!
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_11.korean: 오옷, 드디어 왔슴다!&n안녕하심까! 저는 스틸 라인 부대의 브라우니라고 함다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_12.english: I am a T-3 Leprechaun from the same Steel Line unit. Nice to meet you. I have already heard about you from the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_12.korean: 같은 스틸 라인 부대 소속의 레프리콘입니다. 잘 부탁드립니다.&n사령관 각하께 이야기는 이미 들었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_25.english: T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader... You're the first person I've met who's this frustrating.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_25.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님… 이런 식으로 답답한 사람은 처음임다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_27.english: T-2 Brownie and I are infantry, responsible for close-range fire support and establishing the front line.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_27.korean: 저와 브라우니는 보병으로 근거리 화력 지원과 전선 구축을 맡고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_37.english: I see, that's an introduction! My name is T-50 PX Silky. I belong to the Steel Line Support Unit and am in charge of supplying the squad.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_37.korean: 인사 말씀이시군요! 저는 PX 실키라고 합니다.&n스틸 라인 지원부대 소속으로, 분대의 보급을 담당하고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_76.english: T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader, it's darker here than I thought, so the atmosphere is a bit spooky.
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_76.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님, 여긴 생각보다 어두워서 분위기가 으스스하지 말임다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_8.english: T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader… how long do we have to wait here?
LastCorruptedRecord4-2OP_8.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님… 저희 언제까지 여기서 대기해야 함까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_11.english: I will receive combat rations from T-50 PX Silky, who is in charge of supplies, and proceed with combat eating.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_11.korean: 보급을 담당하는 실키에게 전투 식량을 배급받아 전투 취식에 임하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_46.english: T-50 PX Silky helped me. So I should thank her.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_46.korean: 실키는 저를 도와준 겁니다. 그러니 감사를 드려야 합니다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_51.english: Ah, T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader! That's Staff Sergeant Inabi over there!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_57.english: That's right! We're from the same Steel Line unit, aren't we? I'm always indebted to you, T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader, too!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_57.korean: 맞슴다! 저희는 같은 스틸 라인 부대지 않슴까!&n레프리콘 분대장님에게는 저도 항상 신세 지고 있슴다!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_58.english: I wish T-2 Brownie would stop being so indebted to me now, though.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_58.korean: 브라우니는 이젠 좀 그만 신세 졌으면 하지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_79.english: That sound right now... T-2 Brownie?

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_88.english: T-2 Brownie! This is Sergeant Inabi's combat ration!
LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_88.korean: 브라우니! 이건 이나비 하사님의 전투 식량이잖아요!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3ED_96.english: T-2 Brownie, it hasn't been 15 minutes yet!

LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_6.english: Lily, these are Draculina and Azaz, whom I mentioned.
LastCorruptedRecord4-3SUBED_6.korean: 릴리, 이쪽은 제가 말했던 드라큐리나와 아자즈에요.

LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_25.english: Sergeant T-2 Brownie, can't you sleep because you're getting discharged tomorrow?
LastCorruptedRecord4-4ED_25.korean: 브라우니 병장님, 내일 전역이라 그런지 잠이 안 오심까?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_15.english: You don't need to hear the sounds outside. Fold your wings inside the CoCo & WhiteShellon and hold your breath.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_15.korean: 바깥의 소리는 들을 필요 없단다.&n고치 안에서 날개를 접고 숨을 죽이거라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_94.english: If it doesn't end, we won't part ways, so isn't that a good thing? 'Sergeant T-2 Brownie?'
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_94.korean: 끝나지 않으면 헤어지지도 않으니 좋은 게 아니겠어요?&n'브라우니 병장님?'

LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_95.english: Ugh... T-3 Leprechaun Squad Leader, please just forget about that...
LastCorruptedRecord4-5ED_95.korean: 윽… 레프리콘 분대장님 그 일은 이제 그만 잊어주시지 말임다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_12.english: Your Excellency, the Watcher MQ-20's connection to Sergeant Inabi has been severed…
LastCorruptedRecord4-5OP_12.korean: 각하, 이나비 하사에게 붙여둔 주시자의 연결이 끊어졌습니다…

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_32.english: Rhode? What's up with you again?

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_38.english: Phew... Rhode, that's a shame, but I never said that.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_38.korean: 후… 로데 아쉽지만, 나는 그런 말을 한 적이 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_49.english: Let's eat together! Oh, my name is Rhode!

LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_55.english: Well, that guy is probably busy with his usual routine, as always. Rhode, don't end up like him.
LastCorruptedRecord4-5SUBED_55.korean: 뭐, 그 녀석이라면 언제나처럼 늘상 하던 일로 바쁘겠지.&n로데, 너는 그 녀석처럼 되지 마라.

LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_38.english: (Black Lilith should have been on security today... The fact that the two of them walked in like this means they must have just let them in. The Doctor said he was busy today and would only be doing remote monitoring, too...)
LastCorruptedRecord4-6ED_38.korean: (오늘 경호 담당은 리리스였을 텐데… 두 사람이 이렇게 들어왔다는 건, 그냥 들여보내 준 거겠지.&n닥터도 오늘은 바빠서 원격 모니터링만 한다고 했고…)

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_17.english: I'm going to buy a new coat too. Since it's the coat X-02 Ullr wears... I'll get a wool coat!
LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_17.korean: 나도 신상 코트를 살 거야.&n우르가 입는 코트니까… 울 코트로!

LastCorruptedRecord4-6SUBED_19.english: Aren't you buying something, Prankster Mercury?

LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_8.english: T-2 Brownie… we’re going back to the base now, so get ready.
LastCorruptedRecord4-7SUBED_8.korean: 브라우니… 이제 기지로 돌아갈 거니까 준비하고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_11.english: Vanilla A1, I'm hungry! I want to eat cake quickly!
LastCorruptedRecord4-8SUBED_11.korean: 바닐라, 나 배고파!&n빨리 케이크 먹고 싶어!

LobbyBG_51_SnowField_Desc.english: This is a hologram depicting a snow-covered garden landscape. Enjoy the scenery created by Prototype Labiata exclusively for you.
LobbyBG_51_SnowField_Desc.korean: 눈 덮인 정원의 풍경을 그려낸 홀로그램입니다. 라비아타가 오직 당신만을 위해 만든 풍경을 즐겨보세요.

LobbyBG_65_Desc_Skin_3P_BlackWyrm_2.english: This is the banquet hall where the Black Wyrm S9 whispered affection and regained its emotions.
LobbyBG_65_Desc_Skin_3P_BlackWyrm_2.korean: 블랙 웜이 애정을 속삭이며 감정을 되찾은 연회장입니다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BigChickEX_TU4.english: It's a huge Knight Chick! It behaves just like a Knight Chick, but its armor is thicker and its gun fires harder. Take it out quickly before it moves! &n&n&n - Reporter, T-2 Brownie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BigChickEX_TU4.korean: 엄청 큰 나이트 칙이지 말임다! 하는 짓은 나이트 칙이랑 똑같은데 갑빠도 두껍고 총도 더 쎄게 쏘지 말임다. 움직이기 전에 얼른 죽여야 함다!&n&n&n- 보고자 브라우니지 말임다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BigChickSP_EV1.english: Ugh... I saw the material during ideological training but I still can't tell what's different! Isn't it weirder that someone can distinguish them? &n&n&n - Reporter, T-2 Brownie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BigChickSP_EV1.korean: 으으.. 정신 교육 받을 때 자료를 봤지만 저는 뭐가 다른지 도통 전혀 모르겠지 말임다! 저걸 구분할 수 있는게 더 이상한 거 아닙니까?&n&n&n- 보고자 브라우니지 말임다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BlackKnight_EW.english: It was originally reported as a solitary operative, but after joining the main unit we confirmed Iron Bugs spreading out and attacking centered on it. Because of that, we'll need to rethink area-of-effect strike operations. &n&n&n - Indomitable Marie reporting
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_BlackKnight_EW.korean: 본래는 단독행동을 하는 개체로 보고되었습니다만, 본대에 합류하니 놈을 중심으로 철충들이 산개해서 공격하는 것을 확인했습니다. 덕분에 광역 타격으로 피해를 입히는 작전은 다시 검토해야 할 듯 합니다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_CenturionEX_TU5.english: It appears to be a Metal Parasite that serves as the commander of a small unit. We've detected signs it issues coordinated attacks to nearby Iron Bug. When its subordinates are destroyed it goes on alert. It's best to take it out first. &n&n&n - Daika reporting
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_CenturionEX_TU5.korean: 작은 부대의 지휘관 역할을 하는 철충으로 보입니다. 주변 철충에게 일제 공격을 지시하는 정황이 포착되었군요. 부하들이 파괴되면 경계를 하는 것 같아요. 먼저 처리하는 게 좋을 것으로 보입니다.&n&n&n- 다이카 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Deathstalker_Challenge1.english: - The S7 Deathstalker production lines were destroyed during the Devastation War. That means newly produced S7 Deathstalkers shouldn't exist. &n But this... this is a recently produced unit. Has someone resumed S7 Deathstalker production? &n - Lemonade Alpha
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Deathstalker_Challenge1.korean: 데스스토커의 생산 라인은 멸망 전쟁 당시에 소실되었어요. 새로 만들어진 데스스토커는 존재할 수 없다는 말이죠.&n하지만 이건... 최근에 새롭게 생산된 기체네요. 누군가 데스스토커의 생산을 재개한 걸까요?&n&n - 레모네이드 알파

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EV1.english: A Parasite that devours other Parasites like a Predator. After devouring, its movements slow, so that's the moment to strike. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EV1.korean: 프레데터처럼 같은 철충들을 먹어치워버리는 철충입니다. 철충을 포식한 후에 움직임이 둔해지니 그 때를 노리는 것이 좋아보입니다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EW.english: Unlike before, it's now focusing entirely on devouring Parasites. Is this "fight fire with fire"? Fine — everyone, prioritize that one but don't kill it immediately! We should lure it to devour as many Parasites as possible! &n&n&n - Khan the Swift
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EW.korean: 이전에 봤던 때와는 달리 완전히 철충을 포식하는 것에만 집중하고 있군. 이이제이라는 건가. 좋아, 모두 저 녀석을 우선적으로 노리되 바로 죽이지는 마라! 저 녀석이 최대한 철충들을 포식하게끔 유도해야한다!&n&n&n- 칸

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EW2.english: A Parasite that devours other Parasites like a Predator. After devouring, its movements slow, so that's the moment to strike. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_DoomEater_N_EW2.korean: 프레데터처럼 같은 철충들을 먹어치워버리는 철충입니다. 철충을 포식한 후에 움직임이 둔해지니 그 때를 노리는 것이 좋아보입니다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_EmperorChickSpCH_C.english: T-40 Hyena! Didn't you hear the boss?! Don't start with that one, hit the big guy first! &n&n&n - Quick Camel screaming at the constantly bomb-throwing T-40 Hyena
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_EmperorChickSpCH_C.korean: 하이에나! 대장 말 못 들었어?! 그 녀석 말고 저 덩치 큰 녀석부터 터트려야 한다니까!&n&n&n- 폭탄을 쉴새없이 던지는 하이에나를 향한 퀵 카멜의 절규

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ExecutionerLB_EW.english: This is the sword-like weapon wielded by the Executioner. It moves swiftly, so we'll need the help of sisters who are better at shooting than I am. &n&n&n - Prototype Labiata
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ExecutionerLB_EW.korean: 익스큐셔너가 다루는 검과 같은 무기에요. 날렵하게 움직여서 저보단 사격이 뛰어난 자매들의 도움이 필요할 것 같아요.&n&n&n- 라비아타

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Executioner_EW.english: It's an Executioner. We've confirmed that if it takes enough damage, internal issues occur. You'll likely need a lot of help to deal with it. &n&n&n - Constantia S2 S2
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Executioner_EW.korean: 익스큐셔너에요. 일정 이상의 공격을 받으면 내부적으로 문제가 발생하는 것을 확인했어요. 상대하기 위해선 많은 분들의 도움이 필요할 것 같아요.&n&n&n- 콘스탄챠 S2

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_FABigChickSEX_N.english: Wow! It's bigger and has a thicker shield than the one we saw before! Alright, let's see who guards better! &n&n&n - AS-12 Steel Draco reporting
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_FABigChickSEX_N.korean: 우와! 이전에 봤던 녀석보다 덩치도 더 크고 방패도 더 두꺼워졌어! 좋아, 누가 더 잘 지키는지 승부다!&n&n&n- 스틸 드라코 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Fortress_TR_Basic.english: A disarmed CT-103 Fortress used in the training room.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Gigantes_TR_Basic.english: A disarmed S5 Gigantes used in the training room.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_GoblinT-1MPAR_N.english: T-1 Goblin infantry infected by Iron Bugs

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_GoblinT-1MPDM_N.english: T-1 Goblin sniper infected by Iron Bugs

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_GoblinT-1MPHW_N.english: T-1 Goblin artillery infected by Iron Bugs

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_GoblinT-1MPTT_N.english: T-1 Goblin shield unit infected by Iron Bugs

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_HauntedFortress_N.english: How interesting. I shall present the author's supply before the Demon King. &n&n&n - Goltarion XIII declared.
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_HauntedFortress_N.korean: 흥미롭군. 저자의 수급을 대마왕님 앞에 바치겠노라. &n&n&n- 골타리온 XIII세 선언함.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Intruder_N.english: This level of electronic jamming is nothing. &n&n&n - Reporter X-00 X-00 Tiamat
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Intruder_N.korean: 이정도 전자 교란은 아무것도 아니에요.&n&n&n- 보고자 X-00 티아멧

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Kidnapper_EV1.english: A Metal Parasite Connector built for agent assassinations. Fast and agile. It's best handled by a unit capable of mobile warfare, like mine and my squad. Whether capturing or destroying it, neither will be easy. &n&n&n - Khan the Swift
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Kidnapper_EV1.korean: 요원 암살용 철충 연결체. 빠르고 민첩하다. 나와 우리 부대처럼 기동전이 가능한 부대가 맡는 게 좋을 것 같군. 포획이든 파괴든 쉽지 않다.&n&n&n- 칸

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSPEX_N.english: It seems to have changed strategy. It's faster and more accurate than before. Allies who control the skies should be careful. …Could you pass this on instead? &n&n&n - AL Phantom
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSPEX_N.korean: 전략을 바꾼 것 같네요. 이전보다 더 빠르고 정확해요. 공중을 장악하는 동료들이 조심해야 할 것 같습니다. …대신 전해주실 수 있을까요?&n&n&n- 팬텀

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSPEX_TU2.english: It seems to have changed strategy. It's faster and more accurate than before. Allies who control the skies should be careful. …Could you pass this on instead? &n&n&n - AL Phantom
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSPEX_TU2.korean: 전략을 바꾼 것 같네요. 이전보다 더 빠르고 정확해요. 공중을 장악하는 동료들이 조심해야 할 것 같습니다. …대신 전해주실 수 있을까요?&n&n&n- 팬텀

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSP_EV1.english: A calculating unit that strikes at the enemy's weak points. Since it carries an anti‑materiel sniper rifle, be cautious when deploying heavily armored troops. &n&n&n - AL Phantom
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LegionSP_EV1.korean: 적의 빈틈을 노리는 용의주도한 개체입니다. 대물 저격총을 가지고 있으니 중장갑 전투원을 운용할 때는 주의해주세요.&n&n&n- 팬텀

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeGamma13_N.english: G.O.D: She who seems brainwashed — could it possibly be by Iron Bugs..?
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeGamma13_N.korean: G.O.D: 무언가에 세뇌된 듯한 그녀, 설마 철충에게..?

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta1_C.english: A bioroid fused with Iron Bugs, becoming a new being
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta1_C.korean: 철충과 융합하여 새로운 존재가 된 바이오로이드

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta1_N.english: G.O.D: She who fused with Iron Bugs and turned into something else (?)
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta1_N.korean: G.O.D: 철충과 융합하여 다른 존재가 된 그녀(?)

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta2_C.english: A bioroid fused with Iron Bugs, becoming a new being
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LemonadeZeta2_C.korean: 철충과 융합하여 새로운 존재가 된 바이오로이드

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Leprechaun_N.english: (What the?! We should have cleared all nearby Iron Bug!?)
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Leprechaun_N.korean: (대체?! 인근에 있던 철충은 전부 제거했을 텐데?!)

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LightningBomberMP_N.english: This guy, dodging all over the place must've given everyone a hard time. But my sniping never misses, so just leave it to me. &n&n&n - T-14 Miho reporting
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LightningBomberMP_N.korean: 이 녀석, 요리조리 잘 피해서 다들 애먹었을 거야. 내 저격은 백발백중이니 맡겨만 줘.&n&n&n- 미호 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_LightningBomberMP_TU2.english: This guy, dodging all over the place must've given everyone a hard time. But my sniping never misses, so just leave it to me. &n&n&n - T-14 Miho reporting

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Mammoth_EW.english: Its strike is terrifyingly powerful, and its armor is thick. Weapons that can slip a critical hit between the plating or pierce straight through seem best. Well… if you can't dodge, you're dead, so be careful. &n&n&n - Reporter, GS-10 Sand Girl
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Mammoth_EW.korean: 한 방이 엄청나게 무서운데다 장갑도 두꺼워서 장갑 사이에 치명타를 먹이거나 아니면 관통할 수 있는 무기가 좋아 보이네. 뭐, 못 피하면 죽으니까 조심하라고.&n&n&n- 보고자 샌드걸

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_MarionnetteHA_BOSS_TU.english: Audrey Dreamweaver Dreamweaver underwent enhancement surgery and can now fire with much greater precision. Her consent was not respected in the process. - Taylor Clothcut
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_MarionnetteHA_BOSS_TU.korean: 오드리 드림위버는 강화 시술을 받아 더욱 정밀한 사격을 할 수 있게 되었습니다. 그 과정에서 그녀의 의사는 존중되지 않았습니다. - 테일러 리스트컷

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NestGuardian_EW.english: I didn't know Parasites held religious ceremonies like we do, sir! If you join that ceremony, what do they give you…? &n&n&n - Reporter, T-2 Brownie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NestGuardian_EW.korean: 철충들도 우리처럼 종교행사를 가지고 있는지 몰랐지 말임다! 그런데 저긴 행사에 참여하면 무엇을 주는 검까…?&n&n&n- 보고자 브라우니지 말임다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Nidhogg_C.english: G.O.D: Has it appeared with deeper mSerapias Alice this time?
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Nidhogg_C.korean: G.O.D: 좀더 깊은 악의를 가지고 나타났다?

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickEX_EV1.english: Haa… This pretty one's called a Knight Chick. Pretty, but they're terrifying for having eaten an even prettier CT2199W Fallen. They nonstop spray machine‑gun fire, so please be careful~! &n&n&n - Reporter, T-9 Gremlin
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickEX_EV1.korean: 하아… 이 예쁜 애의 이름은 나이트 칙입니당. 예쁘지만 더 예쁜 폴른이를 잡아먹은 무서운 녀석들이에용. 쉬지않고 기관총을 난사하니 주의해 주세용~!&n&n&n- 보고자 그렘린입니당!

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickEX_EW.english: Haa… This pretty one's name is Knight Chick. Pretty, but terrifying for having devoured an even prettier CT2199W Fallen. Nonstop machine‑gun fire, so be careful~! &n&n&n - Reporter, T-9 Gremlin

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickMEX_N.korean: 흔히 볼 수 있는 미사일로 무장한 철충입니다. 무조건 앞으로 돌격하는 모습이 브라우니와 비슷합니다.&n&n&n- 보고자 레프리콘

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickQMEX_N.english: So this is the Parasite supply unit T-50 PX Silky mentioned. Good, everyone, focus fire on that one! Without its supplies, the rest of them will be powerless! &n&n&n - Royal Arsenal
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickQMEX_N.korean: 실키 양이 말한 철충의 보급 기체인가 보군. 좋아, 모두 저 녀석을 향해 퍼부어라! 보급이 없어진다면 저 녀석들 역시 맥을 못 출 것이다!&n&n&n- 로열 아스널

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickQM_EV1.korean: 철충의 보급 기체네요. 공격 저지 능력이 뛰어나니 주력 공격기를 잘 보호해야 장기전을 방지할 수 있어요.&n&n&n- 실키

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickSI_EW.english: Due to a larger shield than a standard Chick Shielder, attacking targets behind it requires a braver spirit. Make sure to verify on the command console so it's not confused with a regular Chick Shielder. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickSI_EW.korean: 일반 칙 실더보다 큰 방패 때문에 뒤의 대상들을 공격하기 위해선 더 용맹한 정신이 필요하다. 일반 칙 실더와 헷갈리지 않도록 지휘 콘솔을 반드시 확인할 수 있도록 해라&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickSP_EV1.korean: 엄폐와 위장 능력이 뛰어난 철충입니다. 발견하는 즉시, 한 번에 처치하는 게 좋을 것 같습니다.&n&n&n- 발키리 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickSP_EW.english: Unlike before, it's relentlessly targeting weaknesses. Everyone, be careful. &n&n&n - T-8W Valkyrie reporting
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_NightChickSP_EW.korean: 이전과 달리 약점을 집요하게 노리는 모습을 보입니다. 다들 조심하셔야 합니다.&n&n&n- 발키리 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_Challenge3.english: It's devouring nearby Parasites. However, it seems unable to handle the energy it absorbs. Observations show it becomes increasingly unstable the more Parasites it consumes. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_Challenge3.korean: 녀석은 주변 철충을 공격해 잡아먹고 있다. 그런데 아직 흡수한 에너지를 다룰 줄은 모르는 것 같군. 철충을 먹을수록 오히려 불안정해지는 모습을 관찰했다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_EW.english: Among the Predators, this one can handle absorbed energy. It's hard to distinguish on the surface, so exercise caution when engaging related units. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_EW.korean: 프레데터들 중, 흡수한 에너지를 다룰 수 있는 녀셕입니다. 표면상으로 구분하기 어려우니 관련 개체와 전투 시, 주의가 필요할 것 같습니다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_EW2.english: Among the Predators, this one can handle absorbed energy. It's hard to distinguish on the surface, so exercise caution when engaging related units. &n&n&n - Indomitable Indomitable Marie
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Predator_EW2.korean: 프레데터들 중, 흡수한 에너지를 다룰 수 있는 녀셕입니다. 표면상으로 구분하기 어려우니 관련 개체와 전투 시, 주의가 필요할 것 같습니다.&n&n&n- 불굴의 마리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_PuppHead_TR_Basic.english: Disarmed SD3M Pupp Head used in the training room.
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_PuppHead_TR_Basic.korean: 훈련실에 사용되는 무장 해제된 펍 헤드입니다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_PuppHead_TR_Basic1.english: Disarmed SD3M Pupp Head used in the training room.
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_PuppHead_TR_Basic1.korean: 훈련실에 사용되는 무장 해제된 펍 헤드입니다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Raider_EW.english: It's moving more actively than before. We need to synchronize our wings to restrict that Parasite's activity. &n&n&n - T-12 Cailleach Bheur
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Raider_EW.korean: 이전보다 더 활발하게 움직이네요. 날개를 맞춰서 저 철충의 활동을 제한시켜야겠어요.&n&n&n- T-12 칼리아흐 베라

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_RampartC_TR_Basic.english: Disarmed custom version of CT66 Rampart used in the training room.
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_RampartC_TR_Basic.korean: 훈련실에 사용되는 무장 해제된 램파트의 커스텀 버전입니다.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Rampart_TR_Basic.english: Disarmed CT66 Rampart used in the training room.

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ScoutSP_N.english: Those damn flies! They're so fast you can't hit them, and they interfere with whatever you try to do — really annoying pests. I need T-14 Miho, who never misses! &n&n&n - AS-12 Steel Draco
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ScoutSP_N.korean: 저 망할 날파리들! 엄청 빨라서 잘 맞지도 않고 뭐만 하려하면 방해해서 진짜 짜증나는 녀석들이야. 백발백중인 미호가 필요해!&n&n&n- 스틸 드라코 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ScoutSP_TU2.english: Those damn flies! They're so fast you can't hit them, and they interfere with whatever you try to do — really annoying pests. I need T-14 Miho, who never misses! &n&n&n - AS-12 Steel Draco
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ScoutSP_TU2.korean: 저 망할 날파리들! 엄청 빨라서 잘 맞지도 않고 뭐만 하려하면 방해해서 진짜 짜증나는 녀석들이야. 백발백중인 미호가 필요해!&n&n&n- 스틸 드라코 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Scout_EV1.english: Those damn flies! They're so fast you can't hit them, and they interfere with whatever you try to do — really annoying pests. I need T-14 Miho, who never misses! &n&n&n - AS-12 Steel Draco
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Scout_EV1.korean: 저 망할 날파리들! 엄청 빨라서 잘 맞지도 않고 뭐만 하려하면 방해해서 진짜 짜증나는 녀석들이야. 백발백중인 미호가 필요해!&n&n&n- 스틸 드라코 보고함

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Stalker_EV1.english: It's a Metal Parasite Connector. A sneaky type of enemy that gathers power for one massive strike. However, the time it spends charging is short, so it seems best to delay its attack as much as possible and finish it off using my cannons. &n&n&n - Reporter, AT-100 Beast Hunter
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Stalker_EV1.korean: 철충 연결체입니다. 힘을 모아서 엄청난 한 방을 노리는 비열한 타입의 적입니다. 하지만 힘을 모으고 있는 시간은 짧으니 최대한 공격을 늦춰서 제 포를 이용해 처리하는 게 가장 좋아 보이는군요.&n&n&n- 보고자 비스트 헌터

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Stalker_EW.english: Seems like it's learned to regulate its output, Commander. The power of its railgun shots is gradually increasing. We must eliminate it as quickly as possible! &n&n&n - Prester Johanna
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Stalker_EW.korean: 아무래도 출력을 조절하는 법을 터득한 것 같네, 주군. 저 녀석이 쏘는 레일건의 위력이 점차 강해지는 것이 느껴지네. 최대한 신속히 제거해야하네!&n&n&n- 요안나

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Tracker_N.english: It's a scoop, a scoop! I've discovered a totally unique Metal Parasite! It looks completely different and even has sharp claws. Oh, and it's tough enough to withstand my BFG1000, so be careful! &n&n&n - A-14B Spriggan's voice, recorded while filming the Metal Parasite
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Tracker_N.korean: 특종이야, 특종! 완전 특이한 철충을 발견했어! 생김새도 엄청 다르고 날카로운 손톱도 가지고 있어. 아, 그리고 내 BFG1000을 버틸만큼 강하니까 조심해!&n&n&n- 해당 철충을 녹화하며 담긴 스프리건의 목소리

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_Tracker_TU.english: It's a scoop, a scoop! I've discovered a totally unique Metal Parasite! It looks completely different and even has sharp claws. Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_WaspEX_EV1.english: Who the hell gave this bastard that horned stinger? Of course, it's not as fast as me, but anyone slower than me better watch out. It charges in at quite a speed. &n&n&n - P-49 Sleipnir
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_WaspEX_EV1.korean: 누가 이 자식한테 이 뿔침을 달아준 거야? 물론 나처럼 빠르진 않지만 나보다 느린 애들은 전부 조심하도록 해. 제법 빠른 속도로 돌격을 하니 말이야.&n&n&n- 슬레이프니르

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_WaspEX_TU5.english: Who the hell gave this bastard that horned stinger? Of course, it's not as fast as me, but anyone slower than me better watch out. It charges in at quite a speed. &n&n&n - P-49 Sleipnir
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_WaspEX_TU5.korean: 누가 이 자식한테 이 뿔침을 달아준 거야? 물론 나처럼 빠르진 않지만 나보다 느린 애들은 전부 조심하도록 해. 제법 빠른 속도로 돌격을 하니 말이야.&n&n&n- 슬레이프니르

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ZapperEX_EV1.english: It's a low-aggression type. As long as you don't provoke it, it won't attack, so be careful. It uses high-voltage electric attacks. You're not hoping I'll take the hit for you and get jolted awake, are you? &n&n&n - Reporter, Black Black Lilith
Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ZapperEX_EV1.korean: 호전성이 낮은 개체예요. 건드리지만 않으면 공격하지 않으니 주의해 주세요. 고압 전류 공격을 하니까요. 설마 제가 대신 맞아서 찌릿찌릿에 눈 뜨는 걸 바라는 건 아니겠죠?&n&n&n- 보고자 블랙 리리스

Mon_Desc_MOB_MP_ZapperEX_TU5.english: It's a low-aggression type. As long as you don't provoke it, it won't attack, so be careful. It uses high-voltage electric attacks. You're not hoping I'll take the hit for you and get jolted awake, are you? &n&n&n - Reporter, Black Black Lilith

Mon_Desc_MOB_TEST_Nest_B07.english: Be cautious. This is the top-tier Connected Entity: Nest. I'll report information gathered through combat. &n&n First, Nest is ejecting battle machines from its body and sending massive power to them. &n&n Second, if the main body is continuously attacked, it can deploy its own barrier. &n&n Third, destroying the ejected machines while the barrier is active temporarily weakens it. Also, elemental attacks seem to destabilize some weapon systems. &n&n That's all the information I've gathered for now. This won't be an easy battle. I leave the command to you, Commander. &n&n - Reporting: Leona of Blood and Iron
Mon_Desc_MOB_TEST_Nest_B07.korean: 조심해야겠어. 최상급 연결체, 네스트야. 전투를 통해 얻은 정보를 보고할게.&n&n첫째, 네스트는 몸체의 사출 장치에서 전투 기계를 사출하고 그 기계들에게 막대한 동력을 보내고 있어.&n&n둘째, 본체가 계속 공격당하면 자체적으로 배리어를 전개하기도 해.&n&n셋째, 배리어가 전개되어있는 상태에서 사출된 기계를 파괴하니 일시적으로 약해졌어. 그리고 속성 공격에 당하면 일부 무기체계가 불안정해지는 것 같아.&n&n일단 내가 파악한 정보는 여기까지야. 결코 쉽지 않은 전투가 될 거야. 지휘를 부탁할게, 사령관.&n&n-보고자 레오나

Mon_Desc_MP_Ravager.english: The highest-grade connector, Nest, is a form reinforced with Alterium.&nInstead of the fairy drones that assisted Nest disappearing, it has become an individual capable of controlling nanomachines.&nAccording to the Doctor's analysis, the nanomachines this entity handles decompose anything they touch at the molecular level, and with current means, there is no way to stop it.&nIf too much time passes while in contact with the nanomachines… I cannot guarantee the lives of the sisters.&nAs always, I expect your wise command, Commander.&n&nLeona of Blood and Iron
Mon_Desc_MP_Ravager.korean: 최상급 연결체, 네스트가 알터리움으로 강화된 형태야.&n네스트를 보조하던 페어리 드론이 사라진 대신, 나노머신을 조종하는 능력을 가지게 된 개체지.&n닥터의 분석에 의하면 이 개체가 다루는 나노머신은 접촉한 대상을 분자 단위로 분해하는데, 현존하는 수단으로는 이걸 막아낼 수 없다고 해.&n만약 나노머신과 접촉한 채로 너무 오랜 시간이 지난다면... 자매들의 목숨을 장담할 수 없을 거야.&n언제나처럼 현명한 지휘를 기대할게, 사령관.&n&n- 철혈의 레오나

PrePackDesc_Shop_Package_CharTicket_Char.english: Package containing the unit Prototype Labiata, Prototype Labiata’s apron, 1 Commander’s Log, and 1 Pledge Ring.
PrePackDesc_Shop_Package_CharTicket_Char.korean: 전투원 라비아타와 라비아타 용 에이프런과 사령관의 일지 1개, 서약 반지 1개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.

RegPackDesc_Shop_Package_Reg_CharTicket_.english: This is a package containing unit Alexandra of Resonance, 1 Commander's Record, and 1 Pledge Ring.
RegPackDesc_Shop_Package_Reg_CharTicket_.korean: 전투원 공진의 알렉산드라와 사령관의 일지 1개, 서약 반지 1개가 들어있는 패키지입니다.
